outlook_paragraph: Matador Resources shows reduced satellite-derived drilling activity with only 7 active sites at decision date, all of which are continuously active and none newly activated, resulting in a sharp negative relative activity delta of -3.2. This suggests waning operational momentum heading into Q3 2023. Combined with a modest WTI environment averaging around $55 and realized prices at a 8% discount to benchmark, revenue is forecast just under $667.2M. The company's full exposure to the drilling segment amplifies the impact of declining activity trends.
